title: Add Al-Subtain University Questions Bank webite to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: The hive goes to university
gist.blurb: A new community app brings Pollinations to the classroom. The Al-Subtain University Questions Bank uses our API to generate instant explanations for past exam questions.
gist.summary: Added the Al-Subtain University Questions Bank to the community app showcase, highlighting its use of Pollinations for AI-generated exam explanations.
gist.impact: Users can explore how Pollinations is being used in educational tools to help students understand complex exam questions.
gist.visual_concept: Education and studying theme. Polly the bee acting as a scholar or student, interacting with books and a retro computer. The scene should feel like a cozy, late-night study session.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny round reading glasses, reading a glowing lime green (#ecf874) textbook. A chunky retro computer monitor in the background displays a pixelated graduation cap. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
